# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

---
version: '3.9'
services:
  elkstack-elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:${ELKSTACK_VERSION:-7.10.2}
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 8245:9200 # Elasticsearch HTTP port (default).
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node # disable multicast, use single node
      - network.host=_eth0_
    networks:
      - net-elkstack

  elkstack-logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:${ELKSTACK_VERSION:-7.10.2}
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 8246:5044 # Logstash TCP input port (default).
      - 9300:9200 # Elasticsearch TCP port, for auto cluster discovery.
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/conf:/usr/share/logstash/config
    environment:
      LS_JAVA_OPTS: "-Xmx1g -Xms512m" # Logstash Xmx and Xms must match.
      ELASTICSEARCH_URLS:"http://elkstack-elasticsearch:9200"
      ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME:_empty_
      ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD:_<PASSWORD>
    networks:
      - net-elkstack

---
